import io

mut i = 1
let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
import string
let n = list.len(lines)
import list
mut idx = 0
while idx < n
  match lines.get(idx)
  when Some(line)
    if idx == n - 1 and string.is_empty(line)
      idx = idx
    else
      println("#{i}: #{line}")
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    idx = idx
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
